reference: Rebuilt from the user-supplied older walkthrough reference while retaining the current service-scene continuity behavior.

mobile_render_quality.antialiasing: enabled except on detected low-end devices

scroll_system.mapping: exact targetProgress to rendered progress on every render frame
scroll_system.mobile_recovery: scroll events can reactivate rendering from track geometry if observer delivery is delayed

startup_optimizations: Procedural material textures reduced to 384px on capable mobile and 768px on capable desktop.
Live display textures reduced to 768px on capable mobile and 1152px on capable desktop.
Unused preview models, scanner geometry and decorative orbit arches removed.
Connected scene begins preloading 1400px before the section.

visual_direction.presentation: more frontal open-side views, full-width mobile framing, larger desktop framing, matte studio floor, architectural rectangular bases
